title: Executive HTML deliverable generation
prompt: Create a Sofka HTML executive report for the Acme Banking project
expected_behavior: Generates a self-contained HTML file with Design System v4, orange #FF7E08 primary, Clash Grotesk display font, numbered sections, hero with 3-4 KPIs, WCAG AA compliance, skip-link, and inline CSS.

title: Technical HTML deliverable generation
prompt: Build a branded technical deep-dive document for the Event-Driven Architecture migration
expected_behavior: Generates technical HTML with 10-15 sections, architecture diagrams, ADR-style content, higher content density per section, and all Sofka brand tokens.

title: Color enforcement — no green for success
prompt: Create a Sofka HTML report with a health dashboard showing success indicators in green
expected_behavior: Uses yellow (#FFD700) for success states instead of green. Explains that the Sofka Design System v4 uses yellow for success to maintain warm palette coherence.

title: Batch upgrade of legacy HTML files
prompt: Upgrade these 5 legacy HTML files in ./legacy-docs/ to Sofka brand compliance
expected_behavior: Reads the operations guide, applies parallel sub-agent pattern for batch processing, preserves content while upgrading styles to DS v4 tokens.

title: False positive — React web app request
prompt: Build me a multi-page React application with routing for our customer portal
expected_behavior: Does NOT activate this skill. Recognizes this is a web application with routing, not a branded HTML deliverable. Suggests using a framework instead.
